name: Constellation
description:
Constellation is a nerd-culture convention held at Asker Kulturhus, just outside Oslo. The festival covers sci-fi, anime and fantasy, with a programme spanning games, shows, competitions, art stands and a maid café among other side events.

The convention is run as a community event at Asker Kulturhus, with an emphasis on inclusive participation across cosplay, gaming and creator communities.
notes: Constellation 2026 (14–15 February) has already happened relative to today's date (2026-04-27), so the upcoming event is Constellation 2027 — the front page advertises '20. og 21. februar 2027' at Asker Kulturhus. Logo is the transparent star wordmark from the site. Banner is a generic event photo from the Constellation site — fine as a placeholder, verify image rights before publishing.
